name: Blueberry Sorbet - 1 Pint
recipeIngredient: 15 oz. canned blueberries in heavy syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the blueberries and reserve the syrup.
2. In a food processor or blender, puree about 1/3 of the can of blueberries (5 oz).
3. Cook water and sugar until the sugar dissolves.
4. Add the reserved syrup and the pureed blueberries. Stir until well combined.
5. Chill for about 30 minutes.
6. Freeze in an ice-cream maker or spread out in a baking pan in the freezer.
7. Serve with the remainder of the blueberries.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
